titles.romaji: Fei Ren Zai: Xian Shi Wan Jia

description: Jiuyue, an ordinary working fox, and his fellow gods Ao Lie , Nezha , Xiaotian , and Xiaoyu , accidentally stumble into a game world full of traps. Jiuyue, who loves playing games, actively participates in the adventure, hoping to prove himself by leading his friends who are not good at games to pass the levels. However, this plan suddenly changes due to the appearance of two top game bosses. At the same time, the seemingly happy game world is quietly brewing a dramatic change that threatens all players. The little weakling seriously ignites his fighting spirit and tries to weave his destiny with courage! If nothing unexpected happens, something unexpected should happen...
